understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on each level without landing on spike tiles (`u`/`v`), completing levels within the limited turn/attempt budget to ultimately win the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose a horizontal move (`MOVE_LEFT`/`MOVE_RIGHT`) or `CLICK` (optionally `UNDO`). After a horizontal move, gravity automatically carries the character in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid/support tile, hit a hazard (spikes end the run immediately), or reach the goal. `CLICK` interacts with clickable tiles (notably removing breakable `x` blocks) and can open new fall paths; clicks do not move the player unless removing a block causes an immediate gravity fall. `UNDO` reverses the previous action. Successful play involves using landing previews/passage opportunities to change vertical sections efficiently while avoiding hazards.
